body.title: PE chain: skip worker=claude tickets
body.result: Added worker gate in run_pe_entry_chain() between ENTRY and CLAIM: loads ticket via _load_ticket(), checks ticket.worker — if not None/''/igor, sets basket[error] and aborts immediately. Prevents Igor's PE chain from attempting worker=claude tickets (Claude Code skill files).
body.description: PE chain attempts worker=claude tickets (e.g. Claude Code skill files) which are outside the repo sandbox and structurally impossible to work. Fix: check ticket.worker before PLAN/SITUATE — if worker != igor, post to channel and exit immediately without attempting.
